title: Women Riders World Relay shows unity and sisterhood
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Main Street in...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Main Street in Plettenberg Bay became a hub of horsepower as women bikers from the region converged on 17 January to celebrate the official South African launch of the Women Riders World Relay (WRWR).","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Main Street in Plettenberg Bay became a hub of horsepower as women bikers from the region converged on 17 January to celebrate the official South African launch of the Women Riders World Relay (WRWR)."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event marked the start of a year-long global initiative aimed at uplifting and connecting women motorcyclists around the world."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Colette Dart, a real estate agent with Plett Realty and the South African ambassador for WRWR 2026, hosted the launch of the global relay year.","html":"Colette Dart, a real estate agent with Plett Realty and the South African ambassador for WRWR 2026, hosted the launch of the global relay year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dozens of bikes rolled into town in formation with the echo of engines signifying the pride of being part of a growing international sisterhood.","html":"Dozens of bikes rolled into town in formation with the echo of engines signifying the pride of being part of a growing international sisterhood."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"Riding into town surrounded by women who understand the freedom of the road was indescribable. It was more than a ride - it was a statement,\" said Dart."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"EmpowermentThe WRWR initiative highlights visibility, community and empowerment in a space that has long been dominated by men. For some, the relay represents adventure and connection; for others, it offers a significant moment of recognition.","html":"Empowerment
The WRWR initiative highlights visibility, community and empowerment in a space that has long been dominated by men. For some, the relay represents adventure and connection; for others, it offers a significant moment of recognition."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"The launch served as a reminder that women riders are not only present - they are evolving, expanding, and redefining the motorcycling landscape,\" said Dart."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The WRWR relay will continue throughout 2026, passing through multiple countries as part of a global chain of riders exchanging a symbolic baton.","html":"The WRWR relay will continue throughout 2026, passing through multiple countries as part of a global chain of riders exchanging a symbolic baton."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"If the energy of the Plettenberg Bay launch is any indication, the year ahead promises momentum, unity, and a whole lot of unforgettable moments!\" said Dart.","html":"\"If the energy of the Plettenberg Bay launch is any indication, the year ahead promises momentum, unity, and a whole lot of unforgettable moments!\" said Dart."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Colette Dart, Mandy Tracey from Johannesburg, and Linlee Solmns from Cape Town, signing the WRWR South Africa flag. Photos: Chris van Gass","html":"Colette Dart, Mandy Tracey from Johannesburg, and Linlee Solmns from Cape Town, signing the WRWR South Africa flag. Photos: Chris van Gass"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Colette Dart, the new WRWR ambassador from Plett, on her Harley Davidson. Photo: Chris van Gass","html":"Colette Dart, the new WRWR ambassador from Plett, on her Harley Davidson. Photo: Chris van Gass"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read previous article:","html":"Read previous article:"},{"type":"list","items":["Women bike riders to rev it up in Plett"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
